title: Indigo SMP
description: Just a RPG modpack we use to play with friends, nothing crazy.
body:
# Origins, new biomes, new weapons, and a bunch of random cool mods we've found :3
![illustration1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98f84e4ebe467e098daf8c7b6786caac8b4c0616.jpeg)
Thematically this mod-pack is medieval-magic focused, with mods that provide an RPG experience that we think is epic:
- [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)
- [Archers (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers)
- [Jewelry (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)
- [Paladins and Priests (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests)
- [Simply Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-skills)

![illustration2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2e7bb3d79c299a87a64d4de1491907589ab862e.jpeg)
We've added [Item Alchemy](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-alchemy) to the modpack to reduce grinding for building blocks. You can disable it for your playthrough if you don't want it.
![illustration3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c1f422ed7407533423fc2d414b40ebadc36b3c.jpeg)
You can use this modpack to play with friends on LAN. **We do not provide a server-ready version to use on hosted servers!** But if you really want to we can make one :3
